title: Rich Fluffy Russian Banana Wrap
description: A festive and vegan-friendly Russian dish featuring bananas and ssam-wrap, with a mustardy and fluffy twist.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
In a blender or food processor, blend together the vegan mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the chopped fresh dill and lemon juice to the blender and blend until well combined.
Peel the bananas and slice them into 1-inch pieces.
Place a ssam-wrap on a flat surface and spread about 1 tablespoon of the mustard-mayonnaise mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Arrange 2-3 banana slices on top of the mixture.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the bananas.
Fold the bottom half of the ssam-wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Serve the wraps immediately and enjoy.
